wikitext: []: Yamato's influlance to Evangelion             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Sat Jul 27, 2024 12:17 am You know how Yamato influenced Evangelion, other than the similarities to the Mori's suit to Plugsuits and the reference in 3+1 movie I don't see any similarities, because Evangelion is a mecha anime happening on Earth in which we have Christian symbolism and depressing scenes, and SB Yamato is a sci-fi anime in which the action takes place in space and there is nothing exceptional.

Article: Yamatos influlance to Evangelion
[]: Yamato's influlance to Evangelion             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Sat Jul 27, 2024 12:17 am You know how Yamato influenced Evangelion, other than the similarities to the Mori's suit to Plugsuits and the reference in 3+1 movie I don't see any similarities, because Evangelion is a mecha anime happening on Earth in which we have Christian symbolism and depressing scenes, and SB Yamato is a sci-fi anime in which the action takes place in space and there is nothing exceptional.
